tutorial.title: Farmer Setup Tutorial
tutorial.subtitle: Assign fields, seeds, tools, and storage

objectives.label: Research Agricultural Revolution
substeps: Open Research at the settlement Campfire.
This unlocks ordered Farmers and normal food consumption pressure.

objectives.label: Assign a Farmer
substeps: The citizen is pinned to Farmer until released to Auto.

objectives.label: Give the Farmer a hoe
substeps: Put a valid hoe in the worker's tool slot.
Preferred storage can also set tool access for the worker type.
Farmers count as ready only when their requirements are complete.

objectives.label: Mark harvest drop-off storage
substeps: Click the drop-off row in the Job tab.
Harvests go there when the field produces food.

objectives.label: Mark seed storage
substeps: Click the seed source row in the Job tab.
The farmer draws planting stock from this container.

pages.text: Farmers need more setup than gatherers: a job assignment, a hoe, harvest storage, seed storage, and a marked field. They are slower to start, but they become one of the most stable food sources in a settled tribe.
